metadata.name: user-auth-validator
metadata.summary: A library for validating usernames, emails, and passwords.

functions.name: user_auth_validator.validators.validate_username
documentation:
Validates that a username is at least 6 characters long.
\:param username: The username to validate.
\:return: True if valid, raises ValueError if invalid.

functions.name: user_auth_validator.validators.validate_email
documentation:
Validates an email address.
\:param email: The email to validate.
\:return: True if valid, raises ValueError if invalid.

functions.name: user_auth_validator.validators.validate_password
documentation:
Validates a password with the following rules:
\- At least one uppercase letter.
\- At least one lowercase letter.
\- At least one digit.
\- At least one special character.
\:param password: The password to validate.
\:return: True if valid, raises ValueError if invalid.
